segments.text: Matching your DI perfectly to that route
segments.original_text: かかるルートにリンゴのベクトルを完璧に合わせる

segments.text: Yeah, Sonic really does have to be aggressive in this situation
segments.original_text: やっぱりね結構本当にソニックが攻めなきゃいけないような展開になってて
それにTeaが対応してるって感じです
ここに飛び出したくて

full_text: Matching your DI perfectly to that route Yeah, Sonic really does have to be aggressive in this situation And Tea's adapting to it Looking to rush in here
